one_time_description: Comprehensive land claim negotiation debt owed to Canada of $7,499,882 forgiven effective March 31, 2020 (Treaty loan forgiveness)
economic_notes: First Nation holds Forest License A71378 from Province of BC, relinquished to Vesco Contracting Ltd. Ruby Rock Joint Venture held at 50% modified equity. Resource industry revenue and stumpage fees present. COVID-19 noted as subsequent event.
notes: Large one-time item: $7,499,882 treaty loan forgiveness from Canada inflates 2020 surplus significantly. Auditor located in Prince George BC, report signed August 26, 2021 (over 16 months after year-end). Consolidated entities include 0830425 B.C. Ltd. and Yekooche First Nation Negotiation Support Agreement (Treaty). Ruby Rock Joint Venture accounted for by modified equity method. Dispute with Murray Restorations Ltd. for $713,650 plus interest. ISC funding per Note 17 reconciliation used. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $2,639,739 + Province of BC $639,849 + BC Treaty Commission $600,000 + FNHC $115,384 + DFO $77,500 + PGNAETA $75,288 + CSFS $261,930 = $4,409,690; OSR = total revenue minus government transfers. Net debt of $830,903 per Statement of Changes in Net Debt (actual 2020 column). Annual debt service includes term demand loan repayments $115,135 and note payable $50,000 = $165,135. No schedule of remuneration included in available text.
